findings.description: Heading hierarchy does not accurately reflect the source document title structure. The PDF presents a two-line title without semantic heading levels, while the HTML promotes both lines to headings and uses an h1 followed by h2 inside nested main elements.
findings.evidence:
PDF top text: "DWR Water Quality Programs" and "January 2014 Civil Penalty Assessments" centered above the table. HTML: "

DWR Water Quality Programs

January 2014 Civil Penalty Assessments

".
